reasoning: The target threshold is the price on March 1, 2026, which defaults to the February 27 close of 173.05. The combination of the dividend markdown and negative technical/supply momentum strongly anchors the near-term probability below 0.5. For the subsequent March 31 resolution date, a longer horizon of roughly a month allows standard equity drift and normal market volatility to increasingly heavily outweigh the initial 0.6% dividend drop. Consequently, the forecast probability is pulled closer to the base rate of 0.5.
